Title: User registration with valid data
Test Data:
- email: test@example.com
- password: Test1234
- name: Test User
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the email, password, and name.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: - The user is registered successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Test Data:
- email: testexample.com
- password: Test1234

2. Enter the email, password, and name.
3. Click the "Register" button.

Title: User login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: - The user is logged in successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: User login with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed, indicating that the credentials are incorrect.

Title: Create a report with valid data

- user_id: 1

- date: 2023-03-01
- content: Test Report content
Test Steps:

2. Select the user, area, and date.

4. Click the "Create" button.
Expected Result: - The report is created successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

- content: Test Report content
Test Steps:

Title: Send a notification to a user
Preconditions: User is logged in, and a user has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification creation page.
2. Enter the notification message.
3. Select the user to receive the notification.
4. Click the "Send" button.
Expected Result: - The notification is sent successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Send a notification to a non-existent user
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification creation page.
2. Enter the notification message.
3. Select a non-existent user to receive the notification.
4. Click the "Send" button.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed, indicating that the user does not exist.
